code: const API_BASE_URL="";export async function fetchProducts(){const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/api/products"));if(!response.ok)throw new Error("Failed to fetch products");return response.json();}export async function createSupportTicket(payload){const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/api/support/create"),{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},body:JSON.stringify(payload)});if(!response.ok)throw new Error("Failed to create support ticket");return response.json();}
